arts.ttl: Exclusive: Toronto FC 2025 Third Kit to be Yellow - Tribute to Maple Leaf & Niagara
arts.sum: The new Toronto FC 2025 third uniform will celebrate the Maple Leaf and the majesty of Niagara Falls.

arts.ttl: Adidas to Release MLS Third Kits for 5 MLS Teams: Inter Miami, Seattle Sounders, FC Dallas, Real Salt Lake, and Toronto FC
arts.sum: Footy Headlines can leak that Adidas will launch the MLS 2025 third kits for 5 teams, including 4 new teams compared to MLS 2024 including: Inter Miami (old from 2024), Seattle Sounders, FC Dallas, Real Salt Lake and Toronto FC.
